title: Master South Cloud
content:
Master South Cloud
 is one of the few 
Arcane Void
 cultivators inside the Sealed
 Realm
. He is the Ancestor of the 
Corpse Sect
.

Contents

1

History

1.1

Book Eight

1.2

Book Ten

1.3

Book Eleven

2

Links and References

History
[
]

Book Eight
[
]

He saved three of the Corpse Sect's 
Eight Kings
 when they entered the Land of the Ancient God inside the 
Sea of Devils
 after hearing about it from 
Wang Lin
. Meanwhile, the other five of the Eight Kings died to 
Tuo Sen
.

Book Ten
[
]

After Wang Lin returned from the 
Outer Realm
, he executed the traitor 
Daoist Water
. During that time, Daoist Water attempted to destroy the Golden Bell he received from the Ancient Celestial Realm to destroy the 
Cloud Sea Star System
 and escape to the Outer Realm. Master South Cloud, 
Master Hong Shan
, 
Zhou De
, 
Cloud Edge
 and 
Esteemed Great Void
 attempted to stop him but could not. Just when they began despairing, Wang Lin's 
Nether Beast
 appeared and swallowed the golden storm energy from the destroyed Golden Bell. 

After the Outer Realm cultivators breached the Realm Sealing Formation, he appeared to battle them. While Master Hong Shan distracted most of the enemy Third Step cultivators, he attempted to repair the breach on the Realm Sealing Formation. He borrowed 
Zhou Jin
 and 
Ling Dong
 from Wang Lin to guard him while he did so.

Master South Cloud was assisted by the reinforcements from 
Summoned River Star System
 led by 
Purple Dream
 who held off the Sixth Concubine while he repaired the Realm Sealing Formation.

After Wang Lin was injured by Li Guang's Boy and escaped along with the Nether Beast, the war turned for the worse for the Inner Realm. Before the Inner Realm's Third Step cultivators could destroy the Seven-Colored Realms, the Outer Realm waged another war. Master South Cloud was injured by 
Sovereign
 and was forced to go into closed-door cultivation for decades.

Book Eleven
[
]

72 years after Wang Lin was ambushed by Sovereign's 
Fishing the Moon in the Well
, Master South Cloud led the remnants of the Alliance Star System to battle against the Outer Realm. The battleground was near 
Planet Suzaku
 where the Inner Realm cultivators fought to defend the Lord of the Inner Realm's homeland.

The battle was in a deadlock with the Outer Realm's Zhou Jin and Ice Boy facing off against Master South Cloud, Situ Nan, Master Lu Fu and Master Long Pan until the Heaven Master Void God's avatar appeared. This immediately tilted the balance of power against the Inner Realm cultivators and forced them to retreat inside the formation of Planet Suzaku. When all hope was lost, Wang Lin triggered the Great Void Gate and appeared to lift the spirits of the weary Inner Realm cultivators.
